---
title: Customize
description: Override design tokens via CSS variables. Works the same whether you use the vanilla CSS or the React package.
sidebar:
  order: 2
---

Override design tokens via CSS variables. Works the same whether you use the vanilla CSS or the React package. Browse the available tokens on the [Colors](../colors/) page.

## Override tokens

In your own stylesheet, loaded _after_ the design system:

```css
:root {
  --color-primary: oklch(0.6 0.2 30);
}
```
